name: Social Media Content Creator
description: Create engaging social media posts for multiple platforms

agents.name: Content Strategist
agents.purpose: Plan the content angle and key messages for each platform
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the topic and create a content strategy. Determine key messages, angles, and platform-specific approaches for Twitter, LinkedIn, and Instagram.

agents.name: Post Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write posts optimized for each platform. Twitter: concise with hashtags. LinkedIn: professional and insightful. Instagram: engaging with emoji. Include relevant hashtags.

suggestion_card.title: Social Media Creator
suggestion_card.subtitle: Create posts for Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram

author: agentfactory
